raw_jd: IT Support Specialist / End User Support Engineer L1 Experience: 26YearsJob SummaryWe are seeking a proactive and customer-focused IT Support Specialist to provide onsite end-user support, office IT infrastructure support, asset management, and project-based technical assistance. The ideal candidate will be responsible for troubleshooting hardware and software issues, managing IT assets throughout their lifecycle, supporting office technologies, and collaborating with remote technical teams and third-party vendors to ensure smooth IT operations.Key ResponsibilitiesEnd User SupportProvide onsite technical support for desktops, laptops, mobile devices, printers, and peripherals across Windows, macOS, and Linux environments.Troubleshoot hardware, software, operating system, and connectivity issues.Provision, configure, deploy, replace, and decommission IT devices.Assist users with day-to-day technical issues and ensure timely resolution.Coordinate and escalate complex incidents to Level 2 or specialized support teams when required.Office Infrastructure SupportSupport office IT services including network connectivity, printing, collaboration tools, voice systems, AV equipment, and workplace technologies.Troubleshoot Wi-Fi and LAN connectivity issues.Install, maintain, and support network devices such as switches, routers, and wireless access points.Assist with conference room technologies, digital signage, workplace monitors, and smart office solutions.Coordinate with vendors and

gemini_verdict.experience_reason: The JD explicitly mentions an experience requirement of 26 years.
gemini_verdict.profile_reason: The job requires 26 years of experience in IT support, which is entirely incompatible with the candidate's fresher status and software development skill set.
gemini_verdict.title: End User Support Specialist
gemini_verdict.summary: The role is an IT Support Specialist position focused on onsite technical support, hardware/software troubleshooting, and office infrastructure management. It requires significant professional experience, making it unsuitable for a fresh graduate.
gemini_verdict.match_reason: The job requires 26 years of experience in IT support, which is entirely incompatible with the candidate's fresher status and software development skill set.
